---
name: Reader Comprehension
about: Report where the public explanation confused, misled, or failed to persuade a general reader
title: '[READER] '
labels: reader-comprehension, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## Reader background
<!-- General public, skeptical reader, technical reader, policy reader, faith audience, student, worker, etc. Do not include private personal data. -->

## Document or section
<!-- Which public document, app section, or paragraph caused the issue? -->

## What was misunderstood?
<!-- What did the reader think the system meant? -->

## What the document intended to say
<!-- If known, what should the reader have understood? -->

## Confusing words or concepts
<!-- Examples: Flow, Essential Access, Voice, Service Record, Shared Storehouse, demurrage, public banking rails, Founding Order. -->

## Suggested rewrite
<!-- Optional: propose clearer wording. -->

## Severity
<!-- Low: minor wording issue. Medium: slows comprehension. High: creates a false belief about the project. Critical: makes the project look deceptive or coercive. -->
